# Trip Replay

> Records a dense telemetry time-series (position, speed, power, elevation, battery) throughout every trip, enabling post-hoc replay with full speed and elevation profiles.

**Category:** Asset · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** vehicle · trip · replay · telemetry · speed · elevation · ev

## What this does

Records a dense telemetry time-series (position, speed, power, elevation, battery) throughout every trip, enabling post-hoc replay with full speed and elevation profiles.

Specifies 3 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **position_id** *(hidden, optional)* — Position ID
- **trip_id** *(hidden, optional)* — Trip ID
- **vehicle_id** *(text, required)* — Vehicle ID
- **recorded_at** *(datetime, required)* — Recorded At
- **latitude** *(number, required)* — Latitude
- **longitude** *(number, required)* — Longitude
- **speed_kmh** *(number, optional)* — Speed (km/h)
- **elevation_m** *(number, optional)* — Elevation (m)
- **power_kw** *(number, optional)* — Power (kW)
- **battery_level_pct** *(number, optional)* — Battery Level (%)
- **ideal_range_km** *(number, optional)* — Ideal Range (km)
- **rated_range_km** *(number, optional)* — Rated Range (km)
- **outside_temp_c** *(number, optional)* — Outside Temp (°C)
- **inside_temp_c** *(number, optional)* — Inside Temp (°C)
- **is_climate_on** *(boolean, optional)* — Climate On
- **odometer_km** *(number, optional)* — Odometer (km)
- **trip_ascent_m** *(number, optional)* — Trip Total Ascent (m)
- **trip_descent_m** *(number, optional)* — Trip Total Descent (m)
- **trip_speed_max_kmh** *(number, optional)* — Trip Max Speed (km/h)
- **trip_power_max_kw** *(number, optional)* — Trip Max Power (kW)
- **trip_power_min_kw** *(number, optional)* — Trip Min Power / Max Regen (kW)

## What must be true

- **high_frequency_capture:** Position readings are captured at the polling interval during driving (~2.5 seconds) yielding roughly 1440 readings per hour
- **linked_by_trip_id:** Each position reading is linked to its trip by a foreign key enabling ordered reconstruction of the full journey path
- **elevation_backfilled_asynchronously:** Elevation data may be absent from the vehicle API and is backfilled asynchronously by querying an elevation service in batches of approximately 100 positions
- **ascent_descent_from_consecutive_deltas:** Ascent accumulates positive elevation deltas; descent accumulates absolute negative elevation deltas; maximum values are capped to prevent integer overflow
- **power_sign_convention:** Positive power means energy consumed by motor or climate systems; negative power means energy returned via regenerative braking
- **speed_converted_to_km_h:** Speed is stored in km/h; the vehicle API typically provides it in mph and it is converted at ingestion time
- **positions_retained_indefinitely:** All position readings for a trip are retained indefinitely and never pruned after trip aggregation enabling replay at any future time

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Position Recorded During Trip** — when a trip is currently in progress, then One position reading added; trip replay fidelity increases.
- **Elevation Backfilled** — when positions exist with null elevation_m; elevation service is available, then Elevation gaps filled; elevation profile becomes available.
- **Trip Aggregates Computed** — when a trip has just completed; position time series is available for the trip, then Trip aggregates attached; replay with full speed and elevation profile is available.

## Errors it can return

- `ELEVATION_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE` — Elevation data could not be retrieved. Profiles will be incomplete until resolved.

## Connects to

- **vehicle-trip-segmentation** *(required)*
- **driver-behaviour-scoring** *(recommended)*
